paper_title: Protein and Photosynthetic Analysis in P. tricornutum

methods.description: Process for extracting proteins from P. tricornutum cultures and quantifying total protein content using a modified Lowry method.

steps.description: Protein extraction from 25-50 mL of P. tricornutum cultures was carried out by following the protocol described in [10].
steps.searchable_summary: extract proteins from P. tricornutum cultures

steps.description: Total protein contents were quantified by a modification of the Lowry method [47,48] by using a standard curve from known concentrations of bovine serum albumin.
steps.searchable_summary: quantify total protein content using modified Lowry method

methods.description: Measurement of Cc 6 and Cc 550 content in P. tricornutum cells using differential absorbance.

steps.description: Cells were broken by three cycles of French press disruption (20,000 psi), followed by differential clarification and precipitation with ammonium sulphate (55% and 100% for Cc 6; 30% and 60% for Cc 550).
steps.searchable_summary: disrupt cells and precipitate proteins with ammonium sulphate

steps.description: Cc 6 and Cc 550 concentrations were determined by differential absorbance measurements in the final solutions between the fully reduced and fully oxidized states.
steps.searchable_summary: determine Cc 6 and Cc 550 concentrations using differential absorbance

methods.description: Estimation of PSII subunits Cc 550 (PsbV), D1, and PsbO associated with membrane in P. tricornutum cells.

steps.description: Cells from 75 mL cultures were collected and resuspended in 25 mL of 50 mM MES, pH 6.5, buffer supplemented with various additives.
steps.searchable_summary: resuspend cells in buffer with additives

steps.description: Cells were disrupted by three French press cycles at 7000 psi. Unbroken cells were separated by centrifugation at 5000× g for 5 min and supernatants were centrifuged at 170,000× g for 25 min.
steps.searchable_summary: disrupt cells and separate unbroken cells by centrifugation

methods.description: Western-blot analysis of protein extracts using antibodies against specific proteins.

steps.description: Protein extracts were resolved on 15% (w/v) SDS-polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis.
Protein transfer to nitrocellulose membranes, as well as membrane treatment and visualization, were carried out as described in Castell et al. [10].
steps.searchable_summary: transfer proteins to nitrocellulose membranes and visualize

steps.description: Western-blot bands from at least three different immunoblottings were quantified using the Quantity One ® 1-D analysis software.
steps.searchable_summary: quantify Western-blot bands using analysis software

methods.description: Measurement of thermoluminescence glow curves in P. tricornutum cells to study photosynthetic properties.

steps.description: Standard thermoluminescence (TL) glow curves of P. tricornutum cells suspensions were obtained using a home-built apparatus.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain TL glow curves using custom apparatus

steps.description: TL measurements were carried out as described in Roncel et al. [9] and Castell et al. [10] in the absence or presence of DCMU 20 µM.
steps.searchable_summary: perform TL measurements with and without DCMU

methods.description: Measurement of PSII global activity and chlorophyll a fluorescence in P. tricornutum cells.

steps.description: Cells were collected by centrifugation and resuspended in fresh ASW medium to a similar cell density.
Oxygen intake or evolution was determined in 2.5 mL samples using a Clark-type oxygen electrode.
steps.searchable_summary: measure oxygen intake/evolution using oxygen electrode

steps.description: Chlorophyll a fluorescence of PSII from intact cells was determined using a pulse-amplitude modulation fluorometer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure chlorophyll a fluorescence using fluorometer
